query:
SELECT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 FROM v2_job_completed c JOIN v2_job j USING (id)
                WHERE j.workspace_id = $2
                    AND c.started_at > now() - interval '3 hours'
                    AND jsonb_path_exists(c.result, '$.** ? (@.s3 == $k)', jsonb_build_object('k', $1::text))
                    AND j.trigger_kind = 'app'
                    AND j.trigger = $3
                    AND j.created_by = $4
            )
